name: 3.4oz Porcelain Espresso Cup with Saucer White - Threshold™: Traditional Style, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe
description: Experience relaxing coffee time with your family and friends with this White Porcelain Espresso Cup with Saucer from Threshold™. Designed in a classic round silhouette with a shapely curved handle and a rimmed saucer design for a comfortable grip, this espresso cup and saucer set serves well for you and your guests. The classic all-white color makes it elegantly pleasing, and the unique stackable design saves space in your kitchen/bar. This porcelain espresso mug is dishwasher- and microwave-safe for easy heat-up and cleaning.
